title: Seatbelt Mod
description: Prevents the player to dismount vehicle or seat until the key is pressed.
body:
## Seatbelt Mod
Prevents players from dismounting vehicle or seat until the configured key is pressed (**B** by default). Perfect for immersive riding and roleplay! (or just miss-clicking)

## How to Use
- Set your preferred key for **Misc → Seatbelt** in the keybinding menu.
- Mount any vehicle and press key to fasten/unfasten the seatbelt.
- While fastened, you cannot dismount the vehicle.
